serverInfo.name: Trackora — Music Recognition API
serverInfo.description: Cloudflare Worker that proxies ACRCloud, MusicBrainz, iTunes, YouTube, Wikipedia and Spotify for music recognition and metadata enrichment.

tools.name: recognize_music
tools.description: Identify a song from an audio/video file using ACRCloud fingerprinting.

file.description: Audio or video file (multipart/form-data key: file)

tools.name: get_musicbrainz
tools.description: Fetch detailed recording metadata from MusicBrainz (releases, ISRC, genres, works, URL relations).

tools.name: get_itunes
tools.description: Fetch artwork, preview URL and Apple Music link from iTunes Search API.

tools.name: search_youtube
tools.description: Search YouTube for official music videos (top 3 results).

tools.name: get_wikipedia
tools.description: Fetch artist summary from Wikipedia (Japanese preferred, English fallback).

wikidata_id.description: Optional Wikidata QID for precise lookup

tools.name: get_spotify_track
tools.description: Fetch Spotify track details (duration, preview URL, popularity, album art) via Client Credentials flow.

track_id.description: Optional Spotify track ID for direct lookup

tools.name: get_cloud_ranking
tools.description: Get global recognition count ranking (all-time or current month).
